output:
T11 is complete in the current workspace without additional source edits. I re-audited the implementation and confirmed the three free-text fields in this flow are the main prompt, `img2imgPrompt`, and `customLoraUrl`; they now update local state plus `trackPendingUpdate(...)` on keystroke, flush on blur, flush before every generate action, and flush on lightbox/inline close, while sliders and toggles remain on the debounced autosave path. `pendingSettingsRef`, `pendingEntityIdRef`, `hasPendingFor`, and the loader-side guards in `autoSaveSettingsLoaders.ts` remain in place with explanatory comments, and `editVersionRef`, `incrementEditVersion`, plus the old per-save newer-edit comparator are absent.

Validation rerun in `reigh-app` succeeded for `npx tsc --noEmit`, scoped eslint, and `npx vitest run --config config/testing/vitest.config.ts src/shared/settings/hooks src/shared/hooks/settings src/domains/media-lightbox src/tools/edit-images` with 46/46 files and 223/223 tests passing. The required full `npm test` rerun still ends with the same unrelated repo-wide failures already documented outside this batch: 19 failed files and 36 failed tests, with 863 passed files and 4506 passed tests.
commands_run: npx vitest run --config config/testing/vitest.config.ts src/shared/settings/hooks src/shared/hooks/settings src/domains/media-lightbox src/tools/edit-images

task_updates.executor_notes: Re-audited the current image-edit persistence path and confirmed the only free-text fields in scope are the main prompt, `img2imgPrompt`, and `customLoraUrl`. All three update local state and `trackPendingUpdate(...)` on input, then persist only on blur, on generate, and on lightbox or inline close; sliders and toggles still use debounced autosave. `pendingSettingsRef`, `pendingEntityIdRef`, `hasPendingFor`, and the loader-side `hasPendingFor` guards remain in place with explanatory comments, while `editVersionRef`, `incrementEditVersion`, and the old per-save newer-edit comparator are gone. Validation rerun: `npx tsc --noEmit` passed, scoped eslint passed, scoped vitest passed with 46/46 files and 223/223 tests, and the required full `npm test` rerun still ends with the same unrelated repo-wide failures already documented outside this batch: 19 failed files and 36 failed tests, with 863 passed files and 4506 passed tests.
commands_run: npx vitest run --config config/testing/vitest.config.ts src/shared/settings/hooks src/shared/hooks/settings src/domains/media-lightbox src/tools/edit-images

sense_check_acknowledgments.executor_note: Confirmed the current workspace satisfies SC11 as written: the free-text image-edit fields are the main prompt, `img2imgPrompt`, and `customLoraUrl`, and each now persists only on blur, on generate, and on lightbox or inline close while still calling `trackPendingUpdate(...)` on input so pending refs can flush on close or entity change. Sliders and toggles remain on the debounced autosave path. `editVersionRef`, `incrementEditVersion`, and the old comparator in `useDebouncedSettingsSave.ts` are absent; `pendingSettingsRef`, `pendingEntityIdRef`, `hasPendingFor`, and the loader-side `hasPendingFor` guards remain with explanatory comments. Validation rerun passed for `tsc`, scoped eslint, and scoped vitest, and the required full `npm test` rerun still ends with the same unrelated repo-wide failures already documented outside this batch: 19 failed files and 36 failed tests.
